narrative:
Precinct New Paris Village South (precinct in Preble County) has 546 registered voters, with 64.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.5 percentage points.
